column7: Best Practice / Notes
Pin 1=intent, Pin 2=LAMF rate, Pin 3=CTA. Use all 15 for best coverage.
Pin 1=rate reframe, Pin 2=trust+CTA. Aim 80-85 chars.
Each path ≤15 chars. Use readable keywords e.g. /lamf /apply-now
Minimum 4 sitelinks. Use keyword-rich, action-oriented text.
Desc lines are optional but improve CTR. Two desc lines per sitelink.
Minimum 4. Use specific USPs not generic phrases.
Each value ≤25 chars. Min 3 values per header.
Min 5 required. Google combines automatically. Include brand name.
At least 1 required. Make sense standalone — can be only text shown.
Min 2 required. Don't repeat long headline content.
Must match brand. No trademarked terms of competitors.
Same limits as RSA. Min 3, max 15. Aim for 10+.

Required. Must match landing page.

More chars than RSA. Be compelling — this is interruption media.
Focus on value prop. YouTube audience — be inspiring, not just informational.

Desktop only. Recommended ≤30 chars (max 125).

column3: Use 'LAMF' or 'Loan Against MF' only. NEVER 'loan against mutual funds' lowercase, 'mutual funds' standalone, or 'mutual fund loans'.
Always use 10.5%* p.a. with asterisk. Never state '10.5%' without asterisk. Add 'p.a.' always.
Phrase as: 'MF units lien-marked, not sold' OR 'No redemption' OR 'Don't sell MF — pledge it'. Never 'MF units deleted/removed'.
No Foreclosure Charges*, Zero Processing Fees*, No Capital Gains Tax* — ALL need * and compliance review before use.
State as 'up to ₹2 Cr*' with asterisk. Subject to portfolio value and eligibility.
SEBI & RBI Regulated NBFC — exact phrasing required. Do not abbreviate or rephrase.
Do NOT name specific competitor lenders (HDFC, ICICI, etc.) in any ad copy. Use generic 'personal loans' or '18%+'.
HL Pin 2 = 'LAMF @ 10.5%* p.a.' — this must ALWAYS be pinned as HL2 across ALL Google/Bing search campaigns.
